title: Total board or Group mirroring
excerpt: Is there any update on the creation of the feature that would allow complete groups, or boards to be mirrored to another board? I’ve seen this question going back as far as 2020 but the latest update was in 2022(?) that …

posts.author: Knapp33 (Rachel Knapp)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any update on the creation of the feature that would allow complete groups, or boards to be mirrored to another board? I’ve seen this question going back as far as 2020 but the latest update was in 2022(?) that said coming soon…and that was the last…my company just started using monday in january so if this was implemented in 2022 I would expect to see it (but i don’t)…
